iqc.compliance_check: Must link to a SPEC node if material code is present.

pqc.compliance_check: Must link to a PROJECT node.

spec.compliance_check: Acts as a parent node for MEASURE data.

capa.compliance_check: Must have non-empty root_cause and corrective_action fields.

nca.compliance_check: Categorized as 'Open' until disposition is confirmed.

msa.compliance_check: Must link to PQC or OQC measurement activities.
